---
title: "Introduction"
subtitle: "Supervised vs. unsupervised learning"
date: "Aug 28, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Course overview and the landscape of statistical learning. We distinguish supervised problems (regression, classification) from unsupervised ones (clustering, dimensionality reduction), and motivate the rest of the semester through health-science examples.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 2

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [slides_clean](slides_clean.pdf) | [slides_split](slides_split.pdf)

**Code:** [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [fig3.R](code/fig3.R) [fig4.R](code/fig4.R)

**Supplementary readings:** [islr_class1](readings/islr_class1.pdf) [reading1_breimann2001](readings/reading1_breimann2001.pdf) [reading2_gelman2020](readings/reading2_gelman2020.pdf)

**Extras:** [Extra_NoisyLabels.pdf](extras/Extra_NoisyLabels.pdf)
